caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVE DO SHIT" sits in a room decorated with framed photographs and clothing racks. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a stand. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white shirt, and several articles of clothing hang on a rack. Two logos are visible on the screen: a circular black and white logo featuring the word "SMILE" on the left and a red logo that says "SMILE" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man's facial expression shifts as he speaks, moving his mouth and slightly adjusting his head position while maintaining a steady gaze toward someone off-camera. The background elements and the overall composition of the shot remain constant as he talks.
